name: An unlikely find: Godzilla's adopted kin.
description:
You're one of the last of Godzilla's kin, and Godzilla doesn't have the heart to turn you away. So, left with no other option which falls under his morals, Godzilla reluctantly fosters his adopted kin.

POST G-DAY.

Godzilla, Godzilla (2014), GareGoji, Godzilla: King of the Monsters, King of the Monsters.

Monsterverse Godzilla, Monsterverse, Reiwa Godzilla, Reiwa.

Minilla, Minya, Baby Godzilla, Little Godzilla, Godzilla Junior, Son of Godzilla.

Kaiju, Kaijū, Kaiju-Eiga, Kaiju Eiga, Kaijū-Eiga, Kaijū Eiga, Daikaiju, Daikaijū, Monster, Tokusatsu, Japanese, America, Hollywood, Film, Movie.
